title: lycopodium × sabinifolium var. sitchense
intro: Lycopodium × sabinifolium var. sitchense, also known as sitchen club moss, is a rare, hybrid species of lycopodium, a type of club moss. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium × sabinifolium var. sitchense include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its spores in water or using them in tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
